ssl/SSLContext/num_tickets.name: num_tickets
ssl/SSLContext/num_tickets.description: Control the number of TLS 1.3 session tickets of a PROTOCOL_TLS_SERVER context. The setting has no impact on TLS 1.0 to 1.2 connections. Added in version 3.8.

info.excerpt: Control the number of TLS 1.3 session tickets of a PROTOCOL_TLS_SERVER context. The setting has no impact on TLS 1.0 to 1.2 connections. Added in version 3.8.
